title: Implement World Event Management
description: Implement the logic for creating World Events/Fronts and assigning them to a starting tick. This includes recalculating the state of all subsequent ticks to incorporate the event's traits and warning the user about potential overwrites.
ai_instructions: This feature is a combination of asset creation and historical editing. An Event is a type of asset. When it's added to a tick, it should trigger the same kind of state recalculation and warning mechanism as a historical edit.
execution_steps: Add tests to 'tests/timeline.test.ts' for world event management.
Test creating an event and assigning it to a tick.
Test that the event's traits are correctly inherited by assets in subsequent ticks.
Run tests to see them fail.
Add 'createWorldEvent' methods to 'src/services/TimelineService.ts'. This may reuse logic from historical edits.
Implement the full logic for creating the event and recalculating the timeline.
Run tests to verify the implementation.
Add '@trace TASK-018' to all modified files.
definition_of_done: An API endpoint for creating a world event and assigning it to a tick is functional.
Assigning an event correctly recalculates the state of all subsequent ticks.
The system provides a warning before overwriting conflicting states.
All tests for the world event management feature pass.
